---
title: "Car Accidents and Population Growth in Baton Rouge, LA, Tempe, AZ, and Seattle, WA."
author: "Alejandro Calderon, Dylan Craker, Trent Douglas"
date: "6/6/2021"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
options(knitr.duplicate.label = 'allow')

```

## Introduction to the Research
FOr this research, we focused on answering the question of how population growth impacts the total number of fatal car accidents in three cities: Baton Rouge, Tempe, and Seattle. We chose each of these cities because of their different populations, and their differences in density. 


```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
